expo.name: FormCritic
expo.description: AI-powered exercise form analysis using Claude Vision API

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FormCritic needs camera access to record your exercises
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FormCritic needs photo library access to save videos
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FormCritic needs microphone access to record audio during exercises
